% !TEX program = xelatex
% Compile from a workspace containing common/resume.cls: xelatex resume.tex
\documentclass{common/resume}
\begin{document}

\resumeName{\placeholder{name}}
\resumeContact{\placeholder{email} \quad | \quad \placeholder{location} \quad | \quad \placeholder{website} \quad | \quad \placeholder{scholar/profile}}

\resumeSection{Education}
\datedEntry{\placeholder{degree}, \placeholder{institution}}{\placeholder{graduation}}
\placeholder{advisor, thesis, GPA, or honors only when confirmed.}

\resumeSection{Research Experience}
\datedEntry{\placeholder{role or project}, \placeholder{lab/institution}}{\placeholder{dates}}
\begin{itemize}
  \item \placeholder{Research contribution bullet with confirmed method, artifact, or finding.}
  \item \placeholder{Technical contribution bullet with confirmed tools or dataset.}
\end{itemize}

\resumeSection{Selected Publications}
\placeholder{Use selected confirmed publications only. Omit unresolved venues or statuses.}

\resumeSection{Selected Projects}
\datedEntry{\placeholder{project name}}{\placeholder{dates or blank}}
\begin{itemize}
  \item \placeholder{Confirmed research or technical project bullet.}
\end{itemize}

\resumeSection{Skills}
\placeholder{Methods: ...} \quad \placeholder{Programming: ...} \quad \placeholder{Tools: ...}

\end{document}
